text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek has arrived at the Arima Kinen
determined to make me the best trainer in the
world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All at once, the entire crowd erupts into cheers
for the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stage is set for Super Creek to put everything
we've trained for on the line.
